rulings.Case Title: ELMO DE NEVI et al VS. BILLY KIM CHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Billy Chan And Alice Chan'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Reinstate Filings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 4, 2014, line 7. Defendants Billy Chan and Alice Chan's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Reinstate Filings DENIED. Moving party failed to show that the judgment is void, i.e. court lacked power to hear or determine the case. Protections of surety laws are affirmative defense, which have not been plead by the moving party. Additionally, moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that assignor of the lease in a surety where it contradicts express terms of the assignment and there is no knowledge of any surety agreement by the landlord. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE SAU CHEUNG et al VS. GUO WEN HE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 4, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT GUO HE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Substitute service on November 13, 2012 is quashed. Plaintiffs argument hat "it is irrelevant if Defendant actually knew the person who received the service on his behalf" (Opposition 3:27-4:2) is not supported by any authority and is in direct contradiction with CCP 415.20(b), which allows substitute service on a "competent member of the household." Motion is otherwise denied. Defendant has actual notice of the case at least as of March 4, 2013. Default was not taken until August 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 4, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANTs BRITTA GARCIA and JAMES SALTZMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED.
